body: Practice moved to 3:15 tomorrow — buses for the meet leave at 6 sharp. Tell the sprinters.
Good work on the blocks today. Watch the film I sent — your drive phase is getting there. See you Thursday 5:30.
On my way to your place after the long run, Ma. Bringing the greens. Love you.
Can you drop Jaylen at the meet Saturday? I'll have him in the warmup tent by 8.
Thanks for the help loading the tents. Owe you a plate Sunday.
Pastor, I'll be at men's choir 9am this Sunday. Can stay after for the youth program planning.
Dr. Lawson, the Mitchell intake notes are in the shared folder. Cleared him for return-to-run progression.
Morning Monica — can you move my 7:30 eval to 8? Coming straight from the loop run.
Trey, bring your spikes and a second pair of socks for the Oak Mountain course Saturday. It gets muddy.
Mrs. Dawson, Trey ran a season best today. Recruiters from Troy were asking about him.
Jordan, recovery run only tomorrow — keep it easy, 20 min. No hard efforts before the invitational.
Mr. Pruitt, the D1 visit paperwork is due Friday. I can help Jordan fill it out after practice.
Coach, our 4x100 is locked for your invitational. Send me the heat sheet when you have it.
Unc, you coming to the Iron City 5K Nov 8? I'm pacing the back group. Bring your walking shoes.
Got your message about Children's — happy to bring the team by for the visit. Let me know dates.
Isaiah, ice that shin tonight and text me how it feels in the morning. Don't push it.
Dr. Grant, confirming my annual physical and cardiac screening Nov 15. Should I fast that morning?
Deacon Simmons, I can run the men's breakfast setup before service this Sunday. What time?
Ms. Greer, the team fundraiser flyers are printed. Can drop a stack at the church office tomorrow.
Marcus, great split in the 200 today. Hydrate tonight, we go again Thursday. Proud of you.
Tell Nia her uncle says hi. Bringing her the little running medal from the fun run.
Devon — leaving at 6am Friday for the campus visit. Eat breakfast, bring a notebook for the coaches.
Practice moved to 3:15 tomorrow — buses for the meet leave at 6 sharp. Tell the sprinters.
Reminder: home meet today vs Huffman. Field events 4, running 5. Warmup at 3:30.
Appt reminder: your session is tomorrow at Iron City. Arrive 10 min early.
Bus call 6:45 AM Saturday for Oak Mountain. Be early or be left.
Devon — sprint session moved to 5:45 today. Same track, bring spikes.
Rain moving in, practice ends at 5. Get your recovery in.
Meet-day: hydrate tonight, light breakfast, we roll at 6.
Season opener entries are in. Check your events on the board.
Cleared for return-to-run this week. Start with the walk-jog protocol.
Choir rehearsal 9 AM Sunday, service 9:30. See you there.
